title: TechRise Aux Cable 3.5mm to 3.5mm Audio Cable 1.5m, Aux Cord, Aux Lead for Car,Nylon Braided Stereo Jack for Headphones, iPod, iPhone, iPad,Soundbar, TV, PC, Speaker - Superior Sound TRS Cord(Black)
features: Universal Compatibility: Connect and enjoy your audio devices hassle-free with the TechRise 3.5mm Audio Cable. This audio cables 3.5mm jack is compatible with a wide range of devices, including headphones, Apple iPods, iPhones, iPads, tablets, laptops, Hi-Fi or car stereos, smartphones, MP3 players, and more.

Superior Sound Quality: TechRise 3.5mm aux to aux Car Cable is built for superb performance. Experience exceptional sound quality with polished gold-plated/Galvanized connectors(Random delivery) that ensure reliable audio transmission, eliminating signal loss and reducing noise interference. Enjoy clear and immersive audio for your favorite music, movies, and more.

Precise Connector Design: Say goodbye to contact issues. The TechRise aux cable features accurate connector technology, virtually eliminating buzzing and loose contacts. Enjoy uninterrupted audio with a stable connection.The 3.5mm headphone jack Cable not only ideal replacement cable for headphones, but also enhances the function of non-Bluetooth devices.

Tangle-Free and Durable: No more tangled cables. The double shielding provides enhanced protection against interference, and the soft nylon jacket encases the cord, ensuring durability and an extended lifespan. Say goodbye to cable frays and enjoy hassle-free usage.Plus, the headphones 3.5mm jack adopts 24k gold-plated plugs and sturdy brass shells to resist oxidation & corrosion.

Enhanced Interference Protection: Enjoy uninterrupted audio playback. The double shielding significantly enhances interference protection, ensuring a clean and clear audio signal for an optimal listening experience.TechRise jack to jack cable is ready to go and fills your daily life with music.

Ultra-Durable Lifespan: This 3.5mm to 3.5mm headphone cable is built to last. The soft nylon jacket encases the cord, providing additional durability. With an ultra-durable lifespan of over 20,000 bends, this aux to aux cable can withstand daily use and maintain optimal performance.

Lifetime Warranty: Enjoy peace of mind with a lifetime warranty. The TechRise 3.5mm audio cable comes with a lifetime warranty, ensuring that you're covered for any potential defects or issues. Experience worry-free audio connectivity.
description: Product Description TechRise 3.5mm Stereo Aux Cable Connect and enjoy your audio devices with the TechRise 3.5mm aux to aux cable. Enjoy clear and immersive audio for your favorite music, movies, and more. 3.5mm Audio Cable Headphone Mini Jack Wire Ultra Durable & Tangle-Free Perfectly compatible with any devices with a 3.5mm aux port. Such as Apple iPhone, iPod, iPad, Headphones, Hi-Fi, Car Stereos, Tablet, Laptop, Smartphones, MP3 Player and any other audio-playing devices. Excluding Lifeproof Cases.
